raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/2025, I mailed a check in the amount of {$9700.00}, payable to XXXX, for the account under my name ending in XXXX. The check contained the following details : Business Title on Check : Rocket Close, XXXX Escrow Account Date on Check : XX/XX/2025 Amount : {$9700.00} Routing # : XXXX Account # : XXXX Check # : XXXX After allowing sufficient time for processing, I contacted my closing company, Rocket Close, to confirm whether the check had been negotiated. They confirmed that the item was negotiated on XX/XX/2025 and provided proof of this transaction, which I am attaching to this message for your reference. 

I then contacted Macys Customer Service, and a case was opened : Case # XXXX. 

At this time, I am respectfully requesting that Macys ( Citi Bank XXXX XXXX ) either : Credit my account ending in XXXX for the amount of {$9700.00}, or Return the funds to my closing company so they may reissue the payment. 

It has now been a week since the check was received and successfully negotiated. If this matter is not resolved promptly, or if I do not receive confirmation that action is being taken on this case, I will be pursuing legal remedies. 



Thank you for your attention to this urgent matter.
